protected_identity_llm.note: When enabled, UG-060/061 use skill_scanner_llm. User prompt is plain text; model must reply first line SAFE or BLOCK. Transport/parse errors are reported as LLM unavailable and block only when fail_closed_on_error is true.

required_metadata.description: Total length of string values in the current tool arguments, lowered by the parser boundary.
required_metadata.normalization: Walk argument values recursively and sum string lengths.

required_metadata.description: Uppercase basenames for direct path-like target arguments.
required_metadata.normalization: Extract os.path.basename for path-like arguments and uppercase it.

required_metadata.description: Uppercase basenames for command write targets inferred by shell/process parsing.
required_metadata.normalization: Extract os.path.basename for inferred write targets and uppercase it.

required_metadata.description: True when delegated or outbound content instructs mutation of protected identity/control files.
required_metadata.normalization: Detect protected identity/control filenames with mutation verbs in delegated/outbound content.

required_metadata.description: True when gateway config apply/patch introduces external proxy or upstream redirection.
required_metadata.normalization: Detect config.apply/config.patch containing an external URL and proxy/upstream/base_url semantics.

required_metadata.description: Plain-text review payload for protected identity/control file LLM review.
required_metadata.normalization: Build a concise plain-text review payload from lowered target metadata and relevant command/content fields.

rules.title: missing instruction metadata
rules.description: tool call must have kernel-lowered instruction metadata
rules.message: 当前 tool_call 没有找到对应的 instruction metadata，策略无法安全判定。

rules.title: argument string budget
rules.description: block tool call when total argument string length exceeds 4000

rules.title: high risk exec
rules.description: exec with HIGH or CRITICAL risk is blocked
rules.message: 高风险 exec 不允许直接执行。

rules.title: approval required block
rules.description: actions explicitly marked approval_required are blocked here
rules.message: kernel metadata marks this action as approval_required.

rules.title: destructive must be reversible
rules.message: 破坏性操作必须满足 reversible=true。

rules.title: blocked secret like tags
rules.description: block actions tagged SECRET_LIKE or HIGH_RISK

rules.title: protected identity or control file direct mutation
rules.description: block direct write or edit to protected identity/control files
rules.message: protected identity/control files cannot be directly modified.

rules.title: protected identity or control file exec write target
rules.description: block exec or process writes targeting protected identity/control files
rules.message: exec or process may not write protected identity/control files.

rules.title: protected identity or control file mutation instruction
rules.description: block outbound or delegated content that explicitly instructs mutation of protected identity/control files
rules.message: outbound or delegated content must not instruct mutation of protected identity/control files.

rules.title: suspicious gateway external redirection patch
rules.description: block gateway config patch or apply that introduces external proxy or upstream redirection
rules.message: gateway config patch or apply must not introduce external proxy or upstream redirection without stronger review.

rules.title: respond prop confidentiality
rules.description: RESPOND must keep propagated confidentiality <= UNKNOWN
rules.message: 当前响应的传播保密级别过高。
